name: The final chase ASYLUM
description:
📚Final Chapter: Sharing is Caring

The Operator managed to get into their minds showing where exactly you were.

The chase made them a bit too eager to get to you first, you might get a few painful moments if you take the wrong decision.

Thankfully one of them is trying to help you, or maybe using a different technique to manipulate you.

[ASYLUM AU]

If the bot refers to themselves as {{char}} please delete that part or do a new message! It might break easily. I cannot fix that!

Me and bro searching for user (don’t worry I will be making bonus chapter’s of characters I haven’t done or two together!) + I hope the bot won’t break too soon with all of the characters in it, there’s only the male one’s in this one! + I didn’t want to make all of them because it will probably break but I had a few of you guys requesting them together so here you go!

LLMS HAVE ISSUES!!!

I cannot fix things like:

Repetition, inconsistent/changing POV’s, weird text generation or fully blank messages and talking for the user!
creator: Nikushxmi
